display_name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay
description:
Ripper DeMerth wants you to kill Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure, for his role in the abandonment of the Citizens of the North.

Return with proof of his demise.

steps.description: Speak to Ripper DeMerth.
Collect Ear of Kilkay (drops from Captain Kilkay).
Turn in items to Ripper DeMerth.

flags.disabled_text: This is not anything I'm interested in taking from you.

description:
Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure has offered a reward for the death of Ripper DeMerth, a traitor to Port Azure.

Return with proof of the demise of Ripper.

steps.description: Speak to Captain Kilkay.
Collect Ear of Ripper (drops from Ripper DeMerth).
Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

flags.disabled_text: This is absurd. You've given me Ripper's ear already. Did you go back and cut off the other one?

description: You gave a tiny statue of a talking cat to a ghostly talking deer in a dream, and the deer gave you a nightmare.

steps.description: Collect Small Cat Statue (drops from Hypnic).
Turn in items to The Conductor.

flags.disabled_text: No thank you I have one already!

description: You've encountered a dying wish of Fernalla in the Blooming Sepulcher, and it has asked you to find her brother's tomb and defeat its guardian at the entry chamber. Upon doing so, you should return to this wish with a memory of the Burial

steps.description: Speak to A Dying Wish.
Collect Memory of a Guardian (drops from The Crypt Guardian).
Turn in items to A Dying Wish.

description: You've encountered a second wish of Fernalla in the Blooming Sepulcher. This one has asked you to find Balaste, in Vitheo's Rest, and see if you can sense a memory that might reveal if Vitheo was indeed laid to rest there, and what happened next.

steps.description: Speak to A Dying Wish.
Collect Memory of Balaste (drops from Balaste the Fallen).
Turn in items to A Dying Wish.

description: A wish of Fernalla has asked that you find Elwio the Traitor in Vitheo's Rest, within the Traitor's Halls. She feels a great sadness for him, but cannot recall why.

steps.description: Speak to A Dying Wish.
Collect Memory of Elwio (drops from Elwio the Traitor).
Turn in items to A Dying Wish.

description: Fernalla herself has asked that you find Vitheo and be sure his wordly remains are at rest. She has given you a key ingredient for lighting one of the braziers in his tomb to awaken the Guardian who watches over his inner sanctum's key.

steps.description: Speak to Fallen Fernalla.
Collect Memory of Vitheo (drops from Apparition of Vitheo).
Turn in items to Fallen Fernalla.

description: You've powered your Fernallan Rune

steps.description: Collect Inert Rune of Fernalla (drops from Fallen Fernalla).
Collect Eldrich Crystal (drops from Azynthian Keeper).
Turn in items to Verdant Energy.

description: You've heard a legend that if you were to approach the Gate of Fernalla with a worthy gift, it may open for you.

An old Hermit in Fernalla's Field has asked you to recover an old toolbox from a group of bandits who are passing through the area. 

If you are able to recover it, bring it back to him at his home.

steps.description: Speak to A Hermit.
Collect Ornate Toolbox (drops from A Highwayman Raider).
Turn in items to A Hermit.

flags.disabled_text: What sorcery is this... that is not mine! I have mine here!

description:
There is a group of people hidden underneath Port Azure near the docks. A spoken password is required for safe entry - it's "Shadowtide".

You should investigate when you're in the city.

steps.description: Speak to A Missing Person.
Speak to Styria Olafur.

description:
Vethalo Gala in Port Azure's undercity tunnels has offered you a key to Vitheo's Rest - a hidden tomb beneath the city. 

He's asking for one Sivakrux as a trade.

steps.description: Collect Sivakrux (drops from Lost Treasure (1-10), Lost Treasure (10-20), Lost Treasure (20-30)).
Turn in items to Vethalo Gala.

description: You showed the two pieces of the Braxonian Portal to Braxon Elden, and he was able to combine them.

steps.description: Collect Braxonian Portal Shard (Fire) (drops from Braxonian Planar Guard (Fire)).
Collect Braxonian Portal Shard (Ice) (drops from Braxonian Planar Guard (Ice)).
Turn in items to Braxon Elden.

description: You need to find an Eldrich Crystal to power the Rune of Brax, and offer both items to the energy source at his Portal.

steps.description: Speak to A Lost Portal.
Collect Inert Rune of Brax.
Collect Eldrich Crystal (drops from Azynthian Keeper).
Turn in items to Elemental Energy.

db_name: A Magical Sword in Port Azure
stable_key: quest:a magical sword in port azure
display_name: A Magical Sword in Port Azure
description:
There is a magical sword to be had in Port Azure. 

Find a Ruby and two Seaspices for Tristian, who is loitering in the back lots of the houses near the main gate.

steps.description: Speak to Tristan Warton.
Collect Ruby (drops from Shrouded Sivakayan, Sivakayan High Shadow, Sivakayan Shadow).
Collect 2x Seaspice (drops from Cerynth Duskveil, Elizah Vernor, Ghost of Wyland Sercher).
Turn in items to Tristan Warton.

description:
Xander Zaxtrough in Hidden Hills made mention of a missing person he's hunting for. He suspects that the Molorai Militia are holding this person somewhere on Erenshor. 

He mentioned Old Krakengard specifically.

steps.description: Speak to Xander Zaxtrough.
Speak to Cirreus Alxanth.
Speak to Cirreus Alxanth.

description:
Trevor Urchand in Hidden Hills is doing research on Eldoth Molorai. He suspects Eldoth has ties to the resurgence of Necromancy on Erenshor, but needs to know more. 

He says that there may be Necromancers in the Bonepits, and should you find any of their ritual books, he'd like you to bring it to him.

steps.description: Speak to Trevor Ulchand.
Collect Necromancer's Ritual Book (drops from Neophyte Necromancer).
Turn in items to Trevor Ulchand.

description:
A note was given to you by a strange hermit in Fernalla's Revival Plains. Its addressed to a C. Pillot. 

Find him, wherever he is, and deliver the note.

steps.description: Speak to Notes of a Hermit.
Collect Notes of a Hermit (drops from A Hermit, Bommer Olvaro, Liam Olvaro).
Turn in items to Chazz Pillot.

description: You have demonstrated your faith in Sivakaya's Gift to proceed into the inner church of the Jaws of Sivakaya.

steps.description: Speak to Ward of Piety.
Speak to Ward of Piety.
Speak to Ward of Piety.
Speak to Ward of Piety.
Speak to Ward of Piety.
Speak to Ward of Piety.
Speak to Ward of Piety.

description: A portal exists between Blooming Sepulcher and Vitheo's Rest - you can re-activate it by bringing a piece of Vitheo's Rest to the Remnant in Blooming Sepulcher

steps.description: Speak to Remnant.
Collect Vithean Brick (drops from Jack, Rumors, Sockets).
Turn in items to Remnant.

description: Amethi, just outside of town in Stowaway's Step, has expressed interest in making and repairing keys... if you find any broken ones, bring them her way.

db_name: A Sivakayan Horn for Ludo Luxo
stable_key: quest:a sivakayan horn for ludo luxo
display_name: A Sivakayan Horn for Ludo Luxo
description:
Ludo Luxo in Hidden Hills has asked for you to find a Sivakayan Horn from the Bonepits - a cave on the north side of Hidden Hills. 

They make great sharpening stones.

steps.description: Speak to Ludo Luxo.
Collect Sivakayan Horn (drops from A Lesser Avatar of Sivakaya).
Turn in items to Ludo Luxo.

db_name: A Skeleton Eye for Alyssa Fearnon
stable_key: quest:a skeleton eye for alyssa fearnon
display_name: A Skeleton Eye for Alyssia Fearnon
description:
Return a Skeleton Eye to Alyssia Fernon in Hidden Hills. 

She has warned you that they're hard to come by, but every now and then you'll find one on a skeleton of any sort. 

She suggested searching in the cave on the north side of Hidden Hills.

steps.description: Speak to Alyssia Fearnon.
Collect Skeleton Eye (drops from A Skeleton Captain, Bassalt Vallano).
Turn in items to Alyssia Fearnon.

description: You've powered your Solunarian Rune

steps.description: Collect Inert Rune of Soluna.
Collect Eldrich Crystal (drops from Azynthian Keeper).
Turn in items to Verdant Energy.

description:
Jeremie Galyard has offered to trade a trinket he found in Ripper's Keep that he says may have belonged to Azynthi. 

He wants 3 bottles of Azure Mead and a Seaspice.

steps.description: Speak to Jeremie Galyard.
Collect 3x Azure Mead (drops from Priel Malarist).
Collect Seaspice (drops from Cerynth Duskveil, Elizah Vernor, Ghost of Wyland Sercher).
Turn in items to Jeremie Galyard.

flags.disabled_text: I'm still good pal, thanks anyhow.

description: You've powered your Vithean Rune

steps.description: Collect Inert Rune of Vitheo (drops from Apparition of Vitheo).
Collect Eldrich Crystal (drops from Azynthian Keeper).
Turn in items to Verdant Energy.

description:
You've earned the favor of a mysterious brotherhood by finding their lost friend.

Per their instructions, you should make your way to the sandbar beneath the statue of Vitheo for a ride to the mainland.

Rumors of methods to access the Ethereal Planes have been persistent throughout history. 

There may be a way to reach places not meant for humans, and reap the rewards within.
Ghostly beings of Erenshor can leave behind Aetheria if you destroy them. If you find any, Saya Seawatcher in Vitheo's Watch says she has a unique reward for you.

steps.description: Speak to Saya Seawatcher.
Collect Aetheria (drops from A Protected Memory).
Turn in items to Saya Seawatcher.

description: Albixt Munger in Silkengrass fears that his missing wife is now one of the risen pilgrims in the area. If you find her engagement ring on one of them, return it to him for a reward.

steps.description: Speak to Albixt Munger.
Collect Simple Engagement Ring (drops from Risen Pilgrim).
Turn in items to Albixt Munger.

flags.disabled_text: This is not it, I already have it.

description:
Alice Hewer's necklace was eaten by a small crocodile near the lighthouse! 

If you find it, she would like for you to bring it back to her.

steps.description: Speak to Alice Hewer.
Collect Plain Necklace (drops from A Brackish Croc Whelp).
Turn in items to Alice Hewer.

flags.disabled_text: You've already given me my necklace back. This one's not mine... weird that you found two!

description:
Bring 5 Nagalok claws to Annaleigh in Salted Strand. 

She thinks she may be able to make something out of them that you would find useful.

steps.description: Speak to Annaleigh Hephan.
Collect 5x Nagalok Claw (drops from An Immature Nagalok).
Turn in items to Annaleigh Hephan.

description:
Aragath claims to have been imprisoned by a group of necromancers. He thinks they're behind a hidden door in the Island Tomb near a Stone Throne. 

Destroy the necromancers and collect their soul-stones, and reunite those stones with their linked watchlights to absorb their power.

Return the four charged stones to Aragath.

steps.description: Speak to Aragath Swellsteer.
Collect Charged Soul Gem (Posta).
Collect Charged Soul Gem (Leah).
Collect Charged Soul Gem (Revid).
Collect Charged Soul Gem (Stalzo).
Turn in items to Aragath Swellsteer.

flags.disabled_text: I will leave shortly, thank you.

description: A strange hermit in Azynthi's Garden has taken note of you shouting his name. He asked you to speak it to him in person.

steps.description: Shout "Azynthi" near A Strange Hermit.

description: Fredrick in Port Azure would like bear meat.

steps.description: Collect Bear Meat (drops from A Brown Bear, A Grizzly Bear, Albino Kodiak).
Turn in items to Fredrick Templestone.

description:
A fisherman has brought you to a small island he happened upon. He claims that the Island matches the description of the lost Bellwain Isle, where a 100-year wanted Pirate retired into hiding with his wife with all of his treasures. 

The fisherman claims to have disturbed nothing, but something mysterious lingers in the air.
You've handed the lost love letters to Bellwain, but he told you they were not his to take.

steps.description: Collect A Collection of Notes.
Turn in items to Captain Bellwain.

description: You showed the writings from Fallen Braxonia to Braxon Elden, and he was most impressed.

steps.description: Collect Braxonian Scripture (2) (drops from Historian of Braxonia, Prince Ardant).
Collect Braxonian Scripture (1) (drops from Historian of Braxonia, Prince Ardant).
Turn in items to Braxon Elden.

flags.disabled_text: Ah, these are not new... just copies of what you've shown me.

description: Capture Leah's soul from her watchlight on Stowaway's Step

steps.description: Collect Soul Gem (Leah) (drops from Leah).
Turn in items to Watchlight.

description: Capture Posta's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step

steps.description: Collect Soul Gem (Posta) (drops from Posta).
Turn in items to Watchlight.

description: Capture Revid's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step

steps.description: Collect Soul Gem (Revid) (drops from Revid).
Turn in items to Watchlight.

description: Capture Stalzo's soul from his watchlight on Stowaway's Step

steps.description: Collect Soul Gem (Stalzo) (drops from Stalzo).
Turn in items to Watchlight.

description: You're not even sure if this really happened.

steps.description: Collect Catnip (drops from Catnip (Enemy)).
Turn in items to Odd Statue.

description: It may be beneficial to find a way to change the lighthouse color to brighten up the island further...

steps.description: Speak to Warming the Isle.
Collect Blue Burnstone (drops from Fearantula).
Turn in items to Lighthouse Flame.

flags.disabled_text: ... *The flame flares, but does not change.*

description: A Guard in Port Azure has offered you the job of Reliquary Caretaker. All you have to do is go inside and make sure everything is in order. After that, you can do whatever you'd like with it.
William Cardigo has asked you to find out what lurks in the Bonepits and clear it out before it emerges into Willowwatch.

steps.description: Speak to William Cardigo.
Collect Ritual Stone (drops from An Apparition of Sivakaya).
Turn in items to William Cardigo.

flags.disabled_text: Thanks, but you gave me one of these already.

description: William Cardigo at Willowwatch has hinted that if you clear out the bonepits, and bring him proof of slaying the "glowing red demon" deep within, he'd make it worth your while.

Lucian has asked for your help in completing the Stowaway Step Ritual. He needs the following legendary items:

A Loss Stone
A Remnant of Sivakaya
A brain warped  by the Sivakayan Dementia 
A Nightmare Crystal

steps.description: Speak to Lucian Revald.
Collect Loss Stone.
Collect A Remnant of Sivakaya (drops from Vessel Siraethe).
Collect Demented Brain (drops from Demented Malaroth).
Collect Nightmare Crystal.
Turn in items to Lucian Revald.

description: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Dining Room and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Azynthian Dining (drops from Molorai Acquirer, Molorai Ancille).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Livingroom and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Azynthian Livingroom (drops from Molorai Acquirer, Molorai Ancille).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for an Azynthian Resting Place and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Azynthian Rest (drops from Molorai Acquirer, Molorai Ancille).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Shrine and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Game Room (drops from Molorai Archaeologist).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Marketplace and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Loomingwood Market (drops from Aetherfiend, Aviak, Devoratrix).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for an Loomingwood Shrine and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Loomingwood Shrine (drops from Aetherfiend, Aviak, Devoratrix).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Auction House and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Stone Auction (drops from Cinder, Stoneman, Stoneman Colossus).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Bank and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Stone Bank (drops from Cinder, Stoneman, Stoneman Colossus).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Dining Room and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Stone Dining (drops from Cinder, Stoneman, Stoneman Colossus).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Fountain and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Stone Fountain (drops from Cinder, Stoneman, Stoneman Colossus).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Training Room and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Stone Training Room (drops from Diamond Colossus, Stoneman, Stoneman Colossus).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: You've found a blueprint for a Stone Vendor and gave it to a furniture maker.

steps.description: Collect Blueprint: Stone Vendor (drops from Diamond Colossus, Stoneman, Stoneman Colossus).
Turn in items to Breena Carpenter.

description: The Rottenfoot Poachers have asked for Croc tails

steps.description: Speak to Poacher.
Collect Croc Tail (drops from Rotbelly Croc, Stonetooth Croc).
Turn in items to Poacher.

description:
Neziroth Daggerhart had his prized ancestral coin stolen by bandits somewhere in Stowaway's Step. 

If you find it, return it to him near the Shrine to Vitheo.

steps.description: Speak to Trevor Ulchand.
Collect Daggerhart Ancestral Coin (drops from Aranuil Olaseo, Odyss Repman).
Turn in items to Neziroth Daggerhart.

flags.disabled_text: What's this? A duplicate? This is definitely fake!

description: You've achieved something impressive.

steps.description: Collect Captured Light (drops from Warded Shadow).
Turn in items to Kio the Light Keeper.

description:
A group of necromancers in the island tomb claim to be holding a demon named Aragath captive through magic. 

They have asked you to hand the demon an empty soulstone, to absorb his power and finally allow them to leave the island.

steps.description: Speak to Stalzo.
Collect Empty Soul Gem.
Turn in items to Aragath Swellsteer.

flags.disabled_text: I do not need anything else from you. Thank you for your help.

description: Edgar in Silkengrass has promised a generous reward for any Sivakayan Axes or Swords or Sceptres that you're able to bring him.

steps.description: Speak to Edgar Taether.
Collect Sivakayan Axe (drops from Darkwarden Awxa, Darkwarden Ealdred, Darkwarden Ilyth).
Turn in items to Edgar Taether.

flags.disabled_text: I already have all I can eat!

description: Varran Juctor in Fernalla Field would like some of the beads he sees the Risen Druids behind him wearing. Bring him as many as you can find.

steps.description: Speak to Varran Juctor.
Collect Decayed Druid Beads (drops from Bloom Preserver, Elder Guardian, Fawn of Fernalla).
Turn in items to Varran Juctor.

description: Through Larviso, Sivayaka has shown you that Azynthi's corruption has taken hold of all of the Gods of Erenshor. Fernalla, Vitheo, Soluna, and Brax.

Nyltih in Hidden Hills has asked for Faerie Dust from the nearby forest.

It could be dropped by any Faerie that you find.

steps.description: Speak to Nylith Valorro.
Collect Bag of Faerie Dust (drops from A Faerie Drone, A Faerie Enchantress, A Faerie Foliagian).
Turn in items to Nylith Valorro.

flags.disabled_text: Already got it from ya! Thanks anyhow.

description:
You've been pulled into a game of hide and seek... 

Someone (or something) is waiting to be found on Shivering Step.

steps.description: Speak to The Hider.

description: Handing a Riftsnare Gem to the Flickering Souls in Azynthi's Garden pulls them into full existence...

steps.description: Collect Riftsnare Gem (drops from Exalted Firebone, Grounds Keeper, Oracle Miress).
Turn in items to Flicker of Souls.

description: Benson Gamble in Hidden Hills is looking for Graveweed Leaf from the nearby Bonepits. It's located on the north side of Hidden Hills.

steps.description: Speak to Benson Gamble.
Collect Graveweed Leaf (drops from Boatman, Botanist).
Turn in items to Benson Gamble.

description:
A Stormcaller named Windlae in Hidden Hills has asked that you find and fell a beast in the Brake called Grizzlepaw.

She has observed a remnant of a chain stuck in the beast's teeth that may have belonged to a friend of hers.

steps.description: Speak to Windlae Oldseer.
Collect Weathered Chain (drops from Grizzlepaw).
Turn in items to Windlae Oldseer.

description: Hadden in Fernalla's Revival Plains has asked you to take a package of supplies to Ripper's Keep. They'll give you a receipt, and if you bring that back to Hadden he'll reward you.

steps.description: Speak to Hadden Passican.
Collect Box of Supplies.
Turn in items to Leena Halsted.

description: Take the receipt of delivery from Ripper's Keep back to Hadden in Fernalla's Revival Plains.

steps.description: Speak to Hadden's Supplies.
Collect Leena's Receipt.
Turn in items to Hadden Passican.

description:
Go to the Gate and tell the Guard there that you've registered to gain a key to the pass through to the rest of Stowaway's Step. 

(To tell the guard you've registered, target him and press ENTER to type. Type 'I'm registered'.)

steps.description: Speak to Stowaway Registration.
Speak to Corporal Slate.

description: Foreman Hauck in Port Azure has asked you to explore the Lost Cellar and find any Intel that may or may not exist down there. Bring it to him if you find it.

steps.description: Speak to Foreman Hauck.
Collect Aged Interrogation Note (drops from Tortured Prisoner).
Turn in items to Foreman Hauck.

flags.disabled_text: Oh... they made copies of it? Good for the collection, I suppose.

description: Valrae Cleary in Faerie's Brake has asked you to find her a set of keys to Krakengard. The Bunk key and the Tower key are what she's after.

steps.description: Speak to Valrae Cleary.
Collect Krakengard Bunk Key (drops from Molorai Brewmistress).
Collect Krakengard Tower Key (drops from Molorai Captain Sigrid).
Turn in items to Valrae Cleary.

flags.disabled_text: I have these... didn't you give them to me?

description: PLACEHOLDER FOR CONTINUATION
Deliver the deportation papers to Kio the Light Keeper at the Lighthouse and collect his Gate Key for your own use.

steps.description: Speak to Corporal Slate.
Collect Kio's Leave Order.
Turn in items to Kio the Light Keeper.

flags.disabled_text: You've done this to me already! Why rub it in?

description: You should find the recipient of this note, it looks as though it's never going to find its own way.

steps.description: Speak to Note to Liam.
Collect Note to Liam (drops from Bassalt Vallano).
Turn in items to Liam Kilfa.

description: You have restored the Nighthollow Candle, but it is not lit. You must find a Braxonian Flame to ignite the wick and restore the Candle's true power.

steps.description: Speak to Recovering the Nighthollow Candle.
Collect Unlit Nighthollow Candle.
Turn in items to Braxonian Flame Well.

description: Handing an Essence of Lost Faith to a Stardust will take away its invulnerability.

steps.description: Collect Lost Faith (drops from Ancient Celestarian, Ancient Guard, Ancient Knight).
Turn in items to Stardust.

description:
You've made Malaroth Food with:
1 Octorunner
1 Frowney Clowney
1 Azure Mead

steps.description: Collect An Octorunner (drops from Priel Malarist).
Collect A Frowny Clowny (drops from Priel Malarist).
Collect Azure Mead (drops from Priel Malarist).
Turn in items to Baking Oven.

description: Prichard Zemoro has asked you to bring him a treasure map and an elixir of enlightment II. He says he'll give you a Sivakrux for each combo you bring. Prichard is in the slums of Port Azure.

steps.description: Speak to Prichard Zemoro.
Collect Treasure Map.
Collect Elixir of Enlightenment II (drops from Lost Treasure (1-10), Lost Treasure (10-20)).
Turn in items to Prichard Zemoro.

description: Mavik Estonia, of Ripper's Army, has requested you deliver a message to Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure.

steps.description: Speak to Mavik Estonia.
Collect Mavik Easton's Note.
Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

description: Find the four spirits of Shivering Step.
There is a fisherman waiting for you under the cover of night in Blacksalt Strand to take you back to Stowaway's Step.

steps.description: Speak to Bassle Wavebreaker.

description: A note found on Raval's corpse was accepted by the Solunarian Holy Guard. He was not happy to read it.

steps.description: Collect Faded Journal Entry (drops from Raval, The First Paladin).
Turn in items to Valao the Holy.

description:
The Fisherman on the Azure Docks has promised you a trip to a lost Island in exchange for helping him finish his day's fishing quota. 

He needs 4 Octorunners.

steps.description: Speak to Shady Fisherman.
Collect 4x An Octorunner (drops from Priel Malarist).
Turn in items to Shady Fisherman.

description: Valrae Cleary in Faerie's Brake has asked you to bring her four Ogrespice leaves. Who knows what for?

steps.description: Speak to Valrae Cleary.
Collect 4x Ogrespice Leaf (drops from A Grassland Ogre Bruiser, A Grassland Ogre Mystic, A Grassland Ogre Sentinel).
Turn in items to Valrae Cleary.

flags.disabled_text: I have these... didn't you give them to me?

description:
A scribbled note from a madman in the desert has revealed that a mysterious stone that he was holding was the property of Orion Mycon in Port Azure. 

Orion may be interested in receiving it back...

acquisition.source_stable_key: item:gen - scribbles of a mad priest

steps.description: Speak to Scribbles of a Mad Priest.
Collect Tempest Stone (drops from Upha, Priest of Brax).
Turn in items to Orion Mycon.

description: In return for Seaspice, Percy Ildia gave you a note with instructions to give it to the boat captain on the docks who was preparing to leave.

steps.description: Speak to Percy's Seaspice.
Collect A Rolled Note.
Turn in items to Captain Genevieve Voldance.

description: You've found a strange boatman in The Blight and presented your found "Boat Pass" to him. He will grant you passage to Azynthi's Garden now, at your leisure.

steps.description: Collect Sivakayan Boat Pass (drops from Sivakayan Devoted, Sivakayan Faithbound).
Turn in items to Boatman.

description:
Percy has asked for some Sea Spice and in return he has promised passage off of the island. 

He is behind the registration office.

steps.description: Speak to Percy Ildia.
Collect Seaspice (drops from Cerynth Duskveil, Elizah Vernor, Ghost of Wyland Sercher).
Turn in items to Percy Ildia.

flags.disabled_text: Come on now... you're not that gullible!

description: You've placed the Rune of the Hills in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Collect Rune of The Hills.
Turn in items to Hidden Hills Receptacle.

description: You've placed the Rune of Ripper in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Collect Rune of Ripper's Keep.
Turn in items to Ripparian Receptacle.

description: You've placed the Rune of Sands in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Collect Rune of Sands (drops from Sand Mummy, Scorched Skeleton).
Turn in items to Braxonian Receptacle.

description: You've placed the Rune of Silkengrass in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Collect Rune of Silkengrass (drops from Aetherfiend, Shadow Man).
Turn in items to Silkengrass Receptacle.

description: You've placed the Rune of Soluna in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Collect Rune of Soluna's Landing.
Turn in items to Solunarian Receptacle.

description: You've placed the Rune of Winds in its receptacle in the Reliquary

steps.description: Collect Rune of Winds.
Turn in items to Windwashed Receptacle.

description: Raval, the First Paladin, has been trapped in an insanity wracked body for centuries. You've freed him and found his spirit, and his last wish is to know that Astra, the Celestial Dragon, has finally been removed from this plane.

steps.description: Speak to Freed Spirit of Raval.
Collect Heart of Astra (drops from Astra, Rogue of the Stars).
Turn in items to Freed Spirit of Raval.

flags.disabled_text: I'll leave shortly, thank you again.

description:
Larviso in Loomingwood has told you about the Nighthollow Candle. It was stolen from The Wisp long ago. If you find any trace of it, bring it to him. 

He mentioned that a Sivakayan Darkwarden may have interest in it, or perhaps its lost in the Braxonian Desert... worse yet, an antiquities dealer may have recovered it.

steps.description: Speak to Larviso Poltir.
Collect Skull-Shaped Candleholder (drops from Eldoth Molorai).
Collect Nighthollow Wax.
Collect Nighthollow Wick (drops from Darkwarden Awxa).
Turn in items to Larviso Poltir.

flags.disabled_text: What is this, a replica? We have the real candle already.

description:
Orion Mycon has given you his damaged ring. If you can fix it, it's yours. 

He said you should find a jeweler for more help.

steps.description: Speak to Orion Mycon's Lost Ring.
Collect Unsocketed Ring.
Turn in items to Parmalee Gemlyn.

description: Parmalee Gemlyn has asked you to bring back the broken ring, an Elderstone Shard, and a chunk of Citrine Sandsilver in order to repair Orion's Ring

steps.description: Speak to Repairing Orion's Ring.
Collect Unsocketed Ring.
Collect Elderstone Shard (drops from A Deepling Brute, A Deepling Crimsonite, A Deepling Lunarite).
Collect Chunk of Citrine Sandsilver (drops from Candlekeeper, Evadne the Corrupted).
Turn in items to Parmalee Gemlyn.

flags.disabled_text: I can't do that again... it was too much for me.

description: If you find four pieces of a treasure map, you can bring it to Cecil in Faerie's Brake to have it repaired.

steps.description: Collect Torn Treasure Map (Bottom Left).
Collect Torn Treasure Map (Bottom Right).
Collect Torn Treasure Map (Top Left) (drops from Molorai Archaeologist).
Collect Torn Treasure Map (Top Right).
Turn in items to Cecil Threbb.

description:
Guard Captain Kilkay in Port Azure was not pleased with the note Ripper had his men send along. 

He has warned you away from Ripper and his "traitorous army", and has said that if you can acquire their Insignia Badges, he'll reward you handsomly.

steps.description: Collect Ripper Insignia Badge (drops from Armorer Nell, Captain Ovid, Celeso the Historian).
Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

description: Ripper has mentioned rumors of Sivakayans in Port Azure. She has asked that you keep an eye open for evidence of that, and bring it to her should you find it.

acquisition.source_name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay

steps.description: Speak to A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay.
steps.target_name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay

steps.description: Collect Sivakayan Encrypted Plans (drops from Sivakayan Voidmaster).
Collect Sivakayan Codex 1 of 4 (drops from Sivakayan Shadow).
Collect Sivakayan Codex 2 of 4 (drops from Shrouded Sivakayan).
Collect Sivakayan Codex 3 of 4 (drops from Sivakayan High Shadow).
Collect Sivakayan Codex 4 of 4 (drops from Sivakayan Doomshade).
Turn in items to Ripper DeMerth.

chain.quest_name: A Bounty on Guard Captain Kilkay

description: Ripper has reviewed the encryption you brought to her and has determined that Sivakayans have gained access to Port Azure through the lighthouse. She has asked that you investigate.

steps.description: Speak to Ripper's Questline.
Collect Note from Eldoth (drops from Darkwarden Ilyth).
Turn in items to Ripper DeMerth.

rewards.item_stable_key: item:quest - insignia of loyalty to azure

description:
Torado in Wardhaven has asked if you could help him gather components for The Rituals they must perform to restore Sivakaya. He needs:

1 Intact Faerie Wing
1 Devoratrix Thorn
1 Pink Pteriaped Feather

steps.description: Speak to Torado Zortia.
Collect Pink Pteriaped Feather (drops from Pteriaped Chick, Pteriaped Matron).
Collect Devoratrix Thorn (drops from Devoratrix).
Collect Intact Faerie Wing (drops from A Faerie Drone, A Faerie Enchantress, A Faerie Foliagian).
Turn in items to Torado Zortia.

flags.disabled_text: I'm all set for now, but thanks

description:
Alitho, a collector in Port Azure, has asked for you to bring him any Rottenfoot sashes that you may find. 

The Rottenfoot swamps would be a logical place to search for these sashes.

steps.description: Speak to Alitho Echeswer.
Collect Rottenfoot Sash (drops from A Rottenfoot Warrior, Rottenfoot Mauler, Rottenfoot Witchdoctor).
Turn in items to Alitho Echeswer.

description: Samuel in Hidden Hills has asked you to deliver a note to his good friend Harvey Alder, who is likely staying at the Azure Arms in Port Azure.

steps.description: Speak to Samuel Thatcher.
Collect Samuel's Note.
Turn in items to Harvey Alder.

flags.disabled_text: Are you making forgeries now? Get a life.

description: Feed an Eye of Plaxitheris to Occuphage under the lighthouse.

steps.description: Collect Eye of Plaxitheris (drops from Plaxitheris).
Turn in items to Occuphage, Eater of Eyes.

description: Keep your eyes open for any intel on how or why Sivakayans are gaining access to Port Azure. Share it with Guard Captain Kilkay if you find it.

steps.description: Speak to Sivakayan Intel for Kilkay.
Collect Ealdred's Journal (drops from Darkwarden Ealdred).
Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

description: You've learned that seeing is not always easy, but is possible in any light.

steps.description: Read Guide to Sight.

description:
Serra Stile lost her family heirloom shovel in the Elderstone Mines incident. 

She believes it was taken by a slime. If you happen across it, return it to her.

steps.description: Speak to Serra Stiles.
Collect Worn Shovel (drops from A Subterranean Goop, A Subterranean Magmite).
Turn in items to Serra Stiles.

flags.disabled_text: This is someone else's I think. I have mine already.

description: The statue of Sivakaya has gazed upon you.
You've made quite a mark on Shivering Step. It's time to go home.

steps.description: Collect Captured Light (drops from Warded Shadow).
Turn in items to Founder.

flags.disabled_text: Ah, deja vu is a fancy thing.

description:
A recovered page of Sivakayan Intel was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.

He has asked you to continue to search for information on how Sivakayans may be entering Port Azure.

steps.description: Speak to Sivakayan Intel.
Collect Sivakayan Intel (drops from Sivakayan Spymaster).
Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

description: A recovered page of Sivakayan Intel was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.

steps.description: Collect Marching Orders (drops from Gherist Morthario).
Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

description: A recovered journal of a Sivakayan Darkwardenl was handed to Guard Captain Kilkay, who was appreciative of the info.
Ripper asked for you to bring any information you find on Sivakayan activity to her.

steps.description: Speak to Ripper DeMerth.
Collect Sivakayan Intel (drops from Sivakayan Spymaster).
Turn in items to Ripper DeMerth.

description: Supply Sergeant Tipp wants Sivakayan Ore. He says their soldiers carry it sometimes, but it's hard to find.

steps.description: Speak to Supply Sergeant Tipp.
Collect 4x Sivakayan Ore (drops from Candlekeeper, Darkwarden Awxa, Darkwarden Ealdred).
Turn in items to Supply Sergeant Tipp.

flags.disabled_text: I have all I need, thank you for your help.

description:
Despite reports of Sivakayan raiders headed to Port Azure, none have been seen within the city. 

It is suspected that they may be lurking inside the city, somewhere in the shadows. 

If you're able to locate them, report to Captain Kilkay.

steps.description: Speak to Captain Kilkay.
Collect Sivakayan Encrypted Plans (drops from Sivakayan Voidmaster).
Collect Sivakayan Codex 1 of 4 (drops from Sivakayan Shadow).
Collect Sivakayan Codex 2 of 4 (drops from Shrouded Sivakayan).
Collect Sivakayan Codex 3 of 4 (drops from Sivakayan High Shadow).
Collect Sivakayan Codex 4 of 4 (drops from Sivakayan Doomshade).
Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

flags.disabled_text: I've seen this already. If you find more, bring it to me.

description:
The Guard Captain in Port Azure has reviewed the Sivakayan Encryption that you have found and has determined that the Sivakayans have created a secret access point in the Port Azure Lighthouse.

He has given you a key and asked you to investigate.

steps.description: Speak to Sivakayans in Port Azure.
Collect Note from Eldoth (drops from Darkwarden Ilyth).
Turn in items to Captain Kilkay.

rewards.item_stable_key: item:quest - insignia of loyalty to azure

flags.disabled_text: I've seen this already. If you find more, bring it to me.

description:
Once wielded by Soluna herself, the blade was forged from the metal of a moon and bathed in the flames of stars. It is rumored to exist on this plane. 

If your travels bring you across clues, take note.
You've found a Paladin trapped by Azynthi who claims to have had knowledge of Soluna's Celestial Blade stolen from him. If you can restore him, he may be able to share it with you.

steps.description: Collect Stolen Memories (drops from Acolyte of Azynthi, Azynthi, Corruptor of Gods).
Turn in items to Apostalo Ostagla.

description: TO BE CONTINUED
You have found a way to move the fallen angel statue out of the way on Shivering Step

steps.description: Read Awaken the Angel.

description:
Register yourself on the island by bringing your Dock Papers to Controller Wendyl in the registration office.

The registration office is the large building near the docks.

steps.description: Speak to Customs Guard.
Collect Dock Pass.
Turn in items to Controller Wendyl.

description: You are stranded on Stowaway's Step. There has to be a way off... You should ask around and see what you can learn.

steps.description: Speak to Stowaway's Step.
Travel to Hidden Hills.

description: Ta'Dah, the hidden Sorcerer for Ripper has stopped you and offered you a prize for collecting three intact mushroom caps from the cave near Ripper's Keep.

steps.description: Speak to Ta'Dah, Sorcerer of Ripper.
Collect 3x Intact Fungal Cap (drops from Abyssal Fungus Protector, Abyssal Fungus Warrior).
Turn in items to Ta'Dah, Sorcerer of Ripper.

flags.disabled_text: I do not need more, but thank you.

description: You've found ancient Siva-Braxonian teachings that reveal some surprising world history. You've given them to Braxon Michaen who was very impressed.

steps.description: Collect Siva-Braxon Teachings (1) (drops from Arcane Pupil).
Collect Siva-Braxon Teachings (2) (drops from Arcane Pupil).
Collect Siva-Braxon Teachings (3) (drops from Arcane Pupil).
Turn in items to Braxon Michaen.

description: Liani Bosh in Port Azure has asked you to forge an Angler's Ring. With it, you can buy a trip back to Stowaway's Step.

steps.description: Collect Angler's Ring.
Turn in items to Liani Bosh.

description: You met a strange being called "The Bridgekeeper" on Shivering Step

steps.description: Speak to Bridgekeeper.

description: You met a strange being called "The Curator" on Shivering Step

steps.description: Speak to Curator.

description:
To ignite, combine the following in the Dark Flame Brazier in Vitheo's Rest:
2 Blight Crystals
1 Blightwood slab
1 Spark of the First Flame

steps.description: Speak to Dark Flame Recipe.
Collect Blightwood Slab (drops from Blighted Jackal, Lupine Horror, Parzgil).
Collect 2x Blight Crystals (drops from Ancient Sentinel, Blight Demon, Blighted Priest).
Collect Spark of the First Flame (drops from Braxon Prospect, Braxonian Ascended, Braxonian High Guard).
Turn in items to Dark Flame Brazier.

required_items.item_stable_key: item:gen - spark of the first flame

description:
The Ceremonial Flame requires:
1 Ancient Coal
1 Elderstone Shard
1 Wolf Meat
1 Pristine Grass Spider Carapace

steps.description: Speak to The Duskenlight Ritual.
Collect Elderstone Shard (drops from A Deepling Brute, A Deepling Crimsonite, A Deepling Lunarite).
Collect Ancient Coal (drops from Astra, Rogue of the Stars, Braxon Prospect, Braxonian Ascended).
Collect Wolf Meat (drops from Alpha Wolf, Ancient Canine).
Collect Pristine Grass Spider Carapace (drops from A Grass Spider, A Mature Grass Spider).
Turn in items to Ceremonial Brazier.

description: You have been told that it may be possible to combine an Eldrich crystal with an inert rune at the right place of power in order to power the rune once again.

steps.description: Collect Eldrich Crystal (drops from Azynthian Keeper).
Turn in items to Braxon Elden.

description: You met a strange being called "The Gatekeeper" on Shivering Step

steps.description: Speak to Gatekeeper.

description: A strange ghostly statue in the Jaws of Sivakaya claims to have 'awoken the guardian' and that you should let it look upon you for a moment.

steps.description: Speak to A Memory of Sivakaya.

description: You met a strange being called "The Harbinger" on Shivering Step

steps.description: Speak to Harbinger.

description: You've heard rumors of an old tomb on the island that has attracted the attention of strange ritualists. It may be worth investigating if you can find it.

steps.description: Speak to Timothy Allorn.
Travel to Shivering Tomb (2).
Travel to Island Tomb.

description:
To ignite, combine the following in the Life Flame Brazier in Vitheo's Rest:
1 Essence of Nature
1 Gift of Fernalla
1 Loomingwood Branch
1 Droplet of the First Frost

steps.description: Speak to Life Flame Recipe.
Collect Loomingwood Branch (drops from Aviak, Devoratrix, Diva).
Collect Essence of Nature (drops from Corrupted Oread, Dryad Spirit, Fernallan Guardian).
Collect Gift of Fernalla.
Collect Droplet of the First Frost (drops from Historian of Braxonia).
Turn in items to Lifeflame Brazier.

required_items.item_stable_key: item:gen - droplet of the first frost

description: A Ghostly Figure has handed you a stone that contains the very sadness that has been brought upon the world by Azynthi. She instructed you to bring it to someone who might know its true power, she suggested someone who mourns the loss of Sivakaya may be best.

steps.description: Speak to Arcane Headmaster.
Collect Loss Stone.
Turn in items to Larviso Poltir.

flags.disabled_text: It's so incredible! Get it to Lucian.

description: You've been told that it's imperative to get the Loss Stone back to Lucian at Stowaway's Step.

You've found the writings of a treasure hunter and you found his phantom on the Duskenlight Coast near the Malaroth Nesting Grounds. He has asked you to continue the hunt in his name, and directed you to his wife for help. He does not recall where he lived, but he says it was in a busy place. He gave you a small pin to prove to his wife that you've met him.

steps.description: Collect Pg. 1: Faded Entry (drops from A Skeleton Captain).
Collect Pg. 2: Faded Entry (drops from Molorai Captain Sigrid).
Collect Pg. 3: Faded Entry (drops from Druo the Reborn).
Collect Pg. 4: Faded Entry (drops from Spectral Torturer).
Collect Pg. 5: Faded Entry (drops from Ravager, The First Infected).
Collect Pg. 6: Faded Entry (drops from Pyroclast).
Collect Pg. 7: Faded Entry (drops from Darkwarden Ealdred).
Turn in items to Lost Soul.

flags.disabled_text: Oh my, someone made duplicates of these?

description: You've reminded a phantom of who he was in a past life, and he has asked you to continue his treasure hunt. He gave you a pin and directed you to speak to his wife, using the pin as proof of having met him. He said she will help you pick up on his quest where he left off.

steps.description: Speak to The Lost Soul.
Collect Treasure Hunter's Pin.
Turn in items to Julie Xargate.

description: You have a deceased treasure hunter's journal, and a request from his widow to continue his quest. You should bring whatever you find back to him to help put him at rest.
You handed a fisherman his lunch in in return he mentioned he may share a pirate tale.

steps.description: Collect Bread (drops from A Highwayman Marauder, A Highwayman Raider).
Turn in items to Shady Fisherman.

description: You should ask the Shady Fisherman on the Port Azure docks to tell you a tale. He claims to have found something in the sea that may interest an adventurous person like you.

steps.description: Speak to The Lunchbag.
Speak to Shady Fisherman.

description:
You've found a note in the pocket of Brice Mathers. It instructs you to find his brother in Goodsoil. 

His brother's name is Yarren - if you cannot find him, ask for him.

steps.description: Speak to The Mathers Note.
Collect The Mathers Note (drops from The Corpse of Brice Mathers).
Turn in items to Yarren Mathers.

flags.disabled_text: You have the key... if you've lost it I don't know what to tell you. I do not have another.

description:
Yarren Mathers has given you a key to an old church he says is buried in the hills of Blacksalt Strand. 

Locate the church, and see what secrets it holds. 

Return any tomes you find to Yarren and he may share more of what he knows with you.

steps.description: Speak to The Mathers' Demise.
Collect Chapters of Descent, Passage 1 (drops from Acolyte, Prioress).
Collect Chapters of Descent, Passage 2 (drops from Acolyte, Prioress).
Collect Chapters of Descent, Passage 3 (drops from Acceptor).
Collect Chapters of Descent, Passage 4 (drops from Ecclesiarch, Lazalith, Soldier of Sivakaya).
Turn in items to Yarren Mathers.

flags.disabled_text: We've covered this already... show me anything new you find!

description:
Yarren Mathers has studied the Chapters of Descent you found in the old Church.

The tale of Sivakaya, Azynthi, and The Wisp has become more clear, but is still shrouded in mystery. 

Yarren has asked you to search for more pages from the Chapters of Descent.

steps.description: Speak to The Mather's Demise, Part 2.
Collect Chapters of Descent, Passage 5 (drops from Aeiros, Soldier of Sivakaya, Astorim, Balthom, Soldier of Sivakaya).
Collect Chapters of Descent, Passage 6 (drops from Aeiros, Soldier of Sivakaya, Astorim, Balthom, Soldier of Sivakaya).
Collect Chapters of Descent, Passage 7 (drops from Aeiros, Soldier of Sivakaya, Astorim, Balthom, Soldier of Sivakaya).
Collect Chapters of Descent, Passage 8 (drops from Aeiros, Soldier of Sivakaya, Astorim, Balthom, Soldier of Sivakaya).
Turn in items to Yarren Mathers.

flags.disabled_text: We have seen these pages already, have you forgotten?

description: You've found some lost letters meant for Captain Bellwain, and you've given them back to Bellsie Bellwain.

steps.description: Collect A Collection of Notes.
Turn in items to Bellsie Belwain.

description:
Brackfruit Breaded Island Fin
1 Island Fin
1 Brackfruit Juice
1 Bread
1 Coal

steps.description: Collect Island Fin.
Collect Bread (drops from A Highwayman Marauder, A Highwayman Raider).
Collect Brackfruit Juice (drops from A Fungal Sentinel, Aviak, Cloaked Shadow).
Collect Coal (drops from Failed Cremation).
Turn in items to Baking Oven.

description: Jazmyn Challa in Port Azure has asked for you to bring back any clues that might prove her claim that Reavers are the true first people of Erenshor.

steps.description: Speak to Jazmyn Challa.
Collect Wardens of the North (drops from Ancient Celestarian, Ancient Guard, Ancient Knight).
Turn in items to Jazmyn Challa.

flags.disabled_text: Another copy... incredible. Keep that for yourself and enjoy the tale within.

description:
The Ceremonial Flame in Fernalla's Revival Plains requires:

1 Ancient Coal
1 Faerie Dust
1 Remnant of a Day Dream
1 Remnant of a Nightmare

steps.description: Speak to The Fernallan Ritual.
Collect Bag of Faerie Dust (drops from A Faerie Drone, A Faerie Enchantress, A Faerie Foliagian).
Collect Ancient Coal (drops from Astra, Rogue of the Stars, Braxon Prospect, Braxonian Ascended).
Collect Remnants of a Daydream (drops from Dream Invader, Invader of Dreams, Nightmarian Arcanist).
Collect Remnants of a Nightmare (drops from Dream Invader, Invader of Dreams, Nightmarian Arcanist).
Turn in items to Ceremonial Brazier.

description: The odd Hermit has given you a Riftstone and instructed you to find "The Riftsnares" to "Pull the four souls into this realm and destroy them."

steps.description: Speak to A Strange Hermit.
Travel to Azynthi's Garden (Dimensional Rift).

description:
The Ceremonial Flame at Ripper's Keep requires:

1 Sivakrux
1 Planar Stone Shard
1 Ghostly Giant's Blood
1 Unborn Phobia

steps.description: Speak to Unborn Phobia.
Collect Planar Stone Shards (drops from Hypnic, Lost Treasure (1-10), Lost Treasure (10-20)).
Collect Sivakrux (drops from Lost Treasure (1-10), Lost Treasure (10-20), Lost Treasure (20-30)).
Collect Unborn Phobia (drops from Dream Invader, Invader of Dreams).
Collect Ghostly Giant's Blood (drops from A Lost Sea Giant, The Lost Sea Giant King).
Turn in items to Ceremonial Brazier.

description:
Braxon Elden in the Braxonian Desert has expressed interest in the scent of Brashell emanating from the covered well that has been recently excavated. 

If you you happen across any Brashell in your explorations, Braxon Elden may be interested in seeing it.

steps.description: Speak to Braxon Elden.
Collect Brashell (drops from Evadne the Corrupted).
Turn in items to Braxon Elden.

flags.disabled_text: It's so interesting to see this!

description: Sivakaya has asked you to obtain the Secrets of Creation from the corruption that will manifest in the Stowaway's Step Portal. She wants you to bring it to The Wisp.

steps.description: Speak to Larviso Poltir.
Collect Secrets of Creation (drops from Azynthian Keeper).
Turn in items to Larviso Poltir.

flags.disabled_text: You must find a way to reach the Gods!

description: You tried to give the Secrets of Creation to Lucian on Stowaway's Step, but he instructed you to bring it to Larviso in Loomingwood instead.

steps.description: Speak to Lucian Revald.
Collect Secrets of Creation (drops from Azynthian Keeper).
Turn in items to Lucian Revald.

description:
You've met a Shard of Sivakaya inside the portal at the Stowaway's Step Ritual. She warned you of a corruption taking over Erenshor, and asked that you help free the Gods who have touched this world. 

She faded out of existence after her warning, cautioning you of a manifesting corruption nearby.

steps.description: Speak to Shattered Sivakaya.

description: Kio has summoned you to the lighthouse to get your lamp for whatever he has in store next.

steps.description: Speak to Kio the Light Keeper.

description:
The village of Goodsoil in Fernalla's Revival Plane was destroyed by forces unknown. 

Rumors are abound, but figuring out what truly happened may take more time.
You've returned a compass to Asaga Underloft in Port Azure, and he has asked you to continue to explore the mysterious portals in search of his missing father.

steps.description: Collect Small Engraved Compass (drops from Restless Thoughts).
Turn in items to Asaga Underloft.

flags.disabled_text: What is this? Are you making these yourself? Is this some sort of a trick?

description:
Wally Waldorf is near the shop in Stowaway's Step and he really wants a Moongill fish. 

Moongill are known to come out at night and are famously hard to catch.

steps.description: Speak to Cecil Threbb.
Collect A Moongill (drops from Frenzy, Grappler, Plaxitheris).
Turn in items to Wally Waldorf.

flags.disabled_text: I already have all I can eat!

description: You should find a way to ignite the Brazier deep in the cold Island Cave.

steps.description: Speak to The Hider.
Collect Ancient Fang (drops from Dream).
Collect Eternal Ice (drops from Shiverman).
Collect Thief of Breath (drops from Ghost of Plaxitheris, Shadow of Sleep, Shiverman).
Collect Death's Decay (drops from Ghost of Plaxitheris, Shadow of Sleep, Shiverman).
Collect Soul of a Ghostly Beast (drops from Ghost of Plaxitheris).
Turn in items to Warming Flame.

required_items.item_stable_key: item:gen - soul of a ghostly beast

description:
The odd cultists won't say much, but one has mistaken you for their friend 'Wyland' before realizing his error.

If you find this 'Wyland', he may be holding a note or a clue as to what they're up to...

steps.description: Read Torn Note.
Read Marching Orders.

description:
You've found a note on the Ghost of Wyland Sercher. 

Upon reading it, it has instructed you to speak a secret password to an "Elder Brother at the Ritual". 

Approach his brothers, and speak the word to them.

steps.description: Speak to Torn Note.
Collect Torn Note (drops from Ghost of Wyland Sercher).
Turn in items to Lucian Revald.

description:
You have gathered seeds from all of the known Willows in Erenshor and given them to a Watcher high upon a hill in Willowwatch. 

In return, the Watcher has given you a special lens and claimed it will allow its wearer to spot hidden Sivakayans throughout the world. They are thought to wander nearly everywhere on occassion.

steps.description: Collect Azure Willow Seed.
Collect Braxonian Willow Seed.
Collect Duskenlight Willow Seed.
Collect Fernallan Willow Seed.
Collect Ripparian Willow Seed.
Turn in items to Watcher.

flags.disabled_text: I need but one seed from each tree, no more are necessary.

description: Cagnus Marlsen in Willowwatch has asked for you to clear out the old Willow shrine so they can use the fertile soil to grow crops for their settlement.

steps.description: Speak to Cagnus Marlsen.
Collect Willow Soil (drops from Sylvan Giant Runt).
Turn in items to Cagnus Marlsen.

flags.disabled_text: Yeah ok I don't need all of it in bags, knock it off!

description: You have returned a journal to Wishlan that he lost ages ago. He was gracious, and offered you an old trinket he once held dear.

steps.description: Collect Wishlan's Hope (drops from Cinder).
Turn in items to Wishlan the Savior.

description: Wishlan handed you a bag of stones and asked for one to keep.

steps.description: Collect Offering Stone.
Turn in items to Wishlan the Savior.

description: Fredrick in Port Azure would like wolf meat.

steps.description: Collect Wolf Meat (drops from Alpha Wolf, Ancient Canine).
Turn in items to Fredrick Templestone.
